recommendations.title: The Freshman
recommendations.overview: An unathletic college freshman ridiculed by his peers for his mannerisms strives to become popular by making the football team.

recommendations.title: Nowhere Boy

recommendations.title: Safety Last!
recommendations.overview: When a store clerk organizes a contest to climb the outside of a tall building, circumstances force him to make the perilous climb himself.

recommendations.title: Fifty Shades of Grey

recommendations.title: Avengement
recommendations.overview: While on a prison furlough, a lowly criminal evades his guards and returns to his old stomping ground to take revenge on the people who turned him into a cold blooded killer.

recommendations.title: Debt Collectors
recommendations.overview: A pair of debt collectors are thrust into an explosively dangerous situation, chasing down various lowlifes while also evading a vengeful kingpin.

recommendations.title: One Ranger
recommendations.overview: A Texas Ranger is recruited by British Intelligence to track down a dangerous terrorist and stop him from attacking London.

recommendations.title: The Bridges of Madison County
recommendations.overview: Photographer Robert Kincaid wanders into the life of housewife Francesca Johnson for four days in the 1960s.
